CELEBRATION STUDIO ADMIN
View Storefront

Studio Administration

Configure Supabase database synchronization, manual bank accounts, and WhatsApp numbers.

Supabase Status

Offline / Standard Memory Mode

Currently operating in-memory. Save your Supabase connection parameters below to activate real-time synchronization.

Connection Settings

Seed Default Catalog

If your `inventory` table is empty, click below to insert the default exquisite catalog items (Terracotta arch, Silk runners, Lounge sofa, etc.).

SQL Schema Generation

To activate Supabase sync, open the SQL Editor in your Supabase Dashboard and run the following queries to create the inventory and orders tables:

1. Inventory Table Query
CREATE TABLE inventory (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  category TEXT NOT NULL,
  price NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  stock INTEGER NOT NULL,
  available INTEGER NOT NULL,
  image TEXT,
  description TEXT
);
2. Orders Log Table Query
CREATE TABLE orders (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  customer_name TEXT NOT NULL,
  whatsapp_number TEXT NOT NULL,
  email TEXT,
  start_date DATE NOT NULL,
  end_date DATE NOT NULL,
  delivery_needed BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
  delivery_address TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  total_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  rental_days INTEGER NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL,
  items JSONB NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT timezone('utc'::text, now()) NOT NULL
);
